text:
This chapter does not apply to a motor transportation broker who:

(1) is registered as a motor carrier under Chapter 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) ; or

(2) holds a permit issued under Subtitle IV, Title 49, United States Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 646. Motor Transp. Brokers
##### § 646.002 — Exception

This chapter does not apply to a motor transportation broker who:

    (1) is registered as a motor carrier under Chapter 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) ; or

    (2) holds a permit issued under Subtitle IV, Title 49, United States Code.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.153(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*
